name: Arcane Archer
description: An arcane spellcaster who draws upon ancient elven traditions to infuse arrows with potent magical power.
requirements: BAB +6, Point Blank Shot, Precise Shot, Weapon Focus (longbow or shortbow), ability to cast 1st-level arcane spells

classFeatures.name: Enhance Arrows
classFeatures.description: Enhance arrows with +1 enhancement bonus; increases at higher levels.

classFeatures.name: Imbue Arrow
classFeatures.description: Place an area spell upon an arrow, delivering it to the target location.

classFeatures.name: Enhance Arrows (Elemental)
classFeatures.description: Add flaming, frost, or shock to arrows.

classFeatures.name: Seeker Arrow
classFeatures.description: Once per day, fire an arrow that ignores concealment and cover (except total cover).

classFeatures.name: Enhance Arrows (Distance)
classFeatures.description: Arrows gain the distance weapon property.

classFeatures.name: Phase Arrow
classFeatures.description: Once per day, launch an arrow that passes through solid objects.

classFeatures.name: Enhance Arrows (Elemental Burst)
classFeatures.description: Add flaming burst, icy burst, or shocking burst.

classFeatures.name: Hail of Arrows
classFeatures.description: Once per day, fire one arrow at each target within range (up to one per level).

classFeatures.name: Enhance Arrows (Aligned)
classFeatures.description: Add holy, unholy, anarchic, or axiomatic property.

classFeatures.name: Arrow of Death
classFeatures.description: Once per day, create a special arrow that forces a Fort save or die.

name: Arcane Trickster
description: A troublemaker and arcane spellcaster who uses magic to enhance sneaky tactics.
requirements: Sneak Attack +2d6, misdirection, any 3 ranks in Disable Device, Escape Artist, Knowledge (arcana)

classFeatures.name: Ranged Legerdemain
classFeatures.description: Perform Disable Device and Sleight of Hand at range using magic.

classFeatures.name: Sneak Attack +1d6
classFeatures.description: Additional sneak attack damage increases every 2 levels.

classFeatures.name: Impromptu Sneak Attack (1/day)
classFeatures.description: Declare one melee or ranged attack as a sneak attack.

classFeatures.name: Tricky Spells (3/day)
classFeatures.description: Cast spells without being noticed using Stealth.

classFeatures.name: Impromptu Sneak Attack (2/day)
classFeatures.description: Use impromptu sneak attack twice per day.

classFeatures.name: Invisible Thief
classFeatures.description: Can become invisible as a free action for rounds/level per day.

classFeatures.name: Surprise Spells
classFeatures.description: Add sneak attack damage to spells against flat-footed opponents.

name: Assassin
description: A master of dealing quick, lethal blows, trained in the use of poison and skilled at catching foes unaware.
requirements: Alignment evil, Disguise 2 ranks, Stealth 5 ranks, must kill someone for no other reason than to become an assassin

classFeatures.name: Sneak Attack +1d6
classFeatures.description: Extra damage on sneak attacks; increases every 2 levels.

classFeatures.name: Death Attack
classFeatures.description: Study a target for 3 rounds, then attack to paralyze or kill (Fort negates).

classFeatures.name: Poison Use
classFeatures.description: Trained in the use of poison and cannot accidentally poison yourself.

classFeatures.name: Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be caught flat-footed.

classFeatures.name: Save Bonus vs. Poison
classFeatures.description: +1 bonus vs poison, increases every 2 levels.

classFeatures.name: Hidden Weapons
classFeatures.description: +½ class level to Sleight of Hand to hide weapons.

classFeatures.name: True Death
classFeatures.description: Victims of death attack are harder to raise (raise dead DC 15 + assassin level).

classFeatures.name: Improved Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be flanked.

classFeatures.name: Hide in Plain Sight
classFeatures.description: Use Stealth even while being observed within 10 ft of a shadow.

classFeatures.name: Swift Death
classFeatures.description: Apply death attack after 1 round of study (instead of 3).

classFeatures.name: Angel of Death
classFeatures.description: Death attack kill effect becomes a death effect; kill is silent.

name: Dragon Disciple
description: Those who embrace the power of dragons and undergo a transformation to become more draconic.
requirements: Race non-dragon, Knowledge (arcana) 5 ranks, ability to cast 1st-level arcane spells without preparation (spontaneous caster)

classFeatures.name: Blood of Dragons
classFeatures.description: Choose dragon type; gain natural armor +1, claws, bite attack.

classFeatures.name: Natural Armor Increase
classFeatures.description: +1 natural armor; increases at 4th, 7th, 10th.

classFeatures.name: Ability Boost (STR +2)
classFeatures.description: Gain +2 Strength.

classFeatures.name: Dragon Bite
classFeatures.description: Gain bite attack dealing 1d6 + 1.5x STR.

classFeatures.name: Breath Weapon
classFeatures.description: Use breath weapon once/day matching dragon type (Xd6 damage, Ref half).

classFeatures.name: Ability Boost (STR +2)
classFeatures.description: Gain additional +2 Strength.

classFeatures.name: Blindsense 30 ft.
classFeatures.description: Gain blindsense out to 30 feet.

classFeatures.name: Dragon Form (1/day)
classFeatures.description: Transform into a dragon using form of the dragon I.

classFeatures.name: Ability Boost (CON +2)
classFeatures.description: Gain +2 Constitution.

classFeatures.name: Wings
classFeatures.description: Grow wings, gaining a fly speed of 60 ft. (average).

classFeatures.name: Dragon Form (2/day)
classFeatures.description: Use form of the dragon II twice per day; blindsense increases to 60 ft.

name: Duelist
description: A nimble, intelligent fighter trained in making precise attacks with light weapons.
requirements: BAB +6, Dodge, Mobility, Weapon Finesse, Perform (dance) or Tumble 2 ranks

classFeatures.name: Canny Defense
classFeatures.description: Add INT bonus to AC when wearing light or no armor and wielding a melee weapon in one hand.

classFeatures.name: Precise Strike
classFeatures.description: Add class level to damage with light or one-handed piercing melee weapon.

classFeatures.name: Improved Reaction +2
classFeatures.description: +2 bonus on initiative checks.

classFeatures.name: Parry
classFeatures.description: Spend AoO to attempt to parry a melee attack.

classFeatures.name: Enhanced Mobility
classFeatures.description: +4 dodge bonus to AC against attacks of opportunity from movement.

classFeatures.name: Combat Reflexes
classFeatures.description: Gain Combat Reflexes as a bonus feat.

classFeatures.name: Grace
classFeatures.description: +2 on Reflex saves.

classFeatures.name: Riposte
classFeatures.description: Make an AoO against a foe whose attack you successfully parry.

classFeatures.name: Elaborate Defense
classFeatures.description: +1 dodge AC per round of fighting defensively or total defense (replaces normal bonus).

classFeatures.name: Deflect Arrows
classFeatures.description: Deflect one ranged attack per round; gain Deflect Arrows as a bonus feat.

classFeatures.name: Crippling Critical
classFeatures.description: When you confirm a critical hit, apply a penalty chosen from a list of debilitating effects.

name: Eldritch Knight
description: Warriors who blend martial prowess with arcane power, casting spells while wearing heavy armor.
requirements: Able to cast 3rd-level arcane spells, Martial Weapon Proficiency

classFeatures.name: Diverse Training
classFeatures.description: Class levels count as both fighter and wizard levels for feat prerequisites.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting Progression
classFeatures.description: +1 level of existing arcane spellcasting class (levels 2-10).

classFeatures.name: Bonus Combat Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain a bonus combat feat; additional at 9th and 10th level.

classFeatures.name: Spell Critical
classFeatures.description: When you confirm a critical hit, you can cast a spell on that target as a swift action.

name: Loremaster
description: Spellcasters who concentrate on knowledge, gathering lore and uncovering ancient secrets.
requirements: Any 3 metamagic or item creation feats, Knowledge (any two) 7 ranks, ability to cast 7 different divination spells

classFeatures.name: Secret
classFeatures.description: Choose a loremaster secret from the list; gain additional secrets at 3rd, 5th, 7th, 9th.

classFeatures.name: Lore
classFeatures.description: Add class level + INT to Knowledge checks; can make Knowledge checks untrained.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting Progression
classFeatures.description: +1 level of existing spellcasting class (levels 2-10 except 4th, 8th).

classFeatures.name: Bonus Language
classFeatures.description: Learn any new language.

classFeatures.name: Greater Lore
classFeatures.description: Identify magic items as if using identify.

classFeatures.name: True Lore
classFeatures.description: Use legend lore or analyze dweomer once per day as spell-like abilities.

name: Mystic Theurge
description: Blending divine and arcane magic, mystic theurges draw power from both sources.
requirements: Ability to cast 2nd-level divine spells and 2nd-level arcane spells, Knowledge (arcana) 3 ranks, Knowledge (religion) 3 ranks

classFeatures.name: Combined Spells
classFeatures.description: Can prepare arcane spells in divine slots and vice versa (1st level spells).

classFeatures.name: Dual Spellcasting Progression
classFeatures.description: +1 level in both an arcane and divine spellcasting class each level.

classFeatures.name: Combined Spells (2nd)
classFeatures.description: Can prepare 2nd-level spells from either tradition in either slot.

classFeatures.name: Combined Spells (3rd)
classFeatures.description: Can prepare 3rd-level spells from either tradition.

classFeatures.name: Combined Spells (4th)
classFeatures.description: Can prepare 4th-level spells from either tradition.

classFeatures.name: Spell Synthesis
classFeatures.description: Cast one arcane and one divine spell simultaneously as a full-round action.

name: Pathfinder Chronicler
description: Adventurous scholars who record their exploits and the wonders they witness.
requirements: Linguistics 3 ranks, Perform (oratory) 5 ranks, Profession (scribe) 5 ranks, 1 pointed published work

classFeatures.name: Bardic Knowledge
classFeatures.description: Add half class level on Knowledge checks; can make Knowledge checks untrained.

classFeatures.name: Deep Pockets
classFeatures.description: Can retrieve small items from pockets as if having a portable hole for small objects.

classFeatures.name: Live to Tell the Tale
classFeatures.description: Gain a bonus equal to ½ class level on saves vs. death effects.

classFeatures.name: Pathfinding
classFeatures.description: Cannot become lost and +5 on Survival checks in wilderness.

classFeatures.name: Master Scribe
classFeatures.description: Create and use scrolls as if having Scribe Scroll; +1 caster level with scrolls.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Action (move)
classFeatures.description: Spend a standard action to grant an ally an extra move action.

classFeatures.name: Epic Tales
classFeatures.description: Inspire courage as a bard of your chronicler level.

classFeatures.name: Call Down the Legends
classFeatures.description: Summon phantasmal allies from your chronicles.

classFeatures.name: Lay of the Exalted Dead
classFeatures.description: Once per week, inspire allies so profoundly they gain temporary benefits as if under heroes' feast.

name: Shadowdancer
description: Artists of stealth and deception who manipulate shadows and darkness.
requirements: Dodge, Mobility, Combat Reflexes, Stealth 5 ranks, Perform (dance) 2 ranks

classFeatures.name: Hide in Plain Sight
classFeatures.description: Use Stealth even while being observed as long as within 10 ft of dim light.

classFeatures.name: Evasion
classFeatures.description: No damage on successful Reflex save.

classFeatures.name: Darkvision
classFeatures.description: Gain darkvision 60 ft or extend existing by 30 ft.

classFeatures.name: Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be caught flat-footed.

classFeatures.name: Shadow Illusion
classFeatures.description: Cast silent image 1/day using shadows as spell-like ability.

classFeatures.name: Summon Shadow
classFeatures.description: Summon an undead shadow companion.

classFeatures.name: Shadow Call
classFeatures.description: Cast shadow conjuration 1/day as spell-like ability.

classFeatures.name: Shadow Jump (40 ft/day)
classFeatures.description: Travel between shadows as dimension door; distance increases.

classFeatures.name: Defensive Roll
classFeatures.description: Once per day, avoid lethal damage with a Reflex save.

classFeatures.name: Improved Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be flanked.

classFeatures.name: Slippery Mind
classFeatures.description: Second save against enchantment effects.

classFeatures.name: Shadow Master
classFeatures.description: In dim light, gain DR 10/—, +2 luck bonus on saves. Can see in magical darkness.
